abilities.description: When you @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.fvxIsI6u73hkrK6J]{Hunker Down} by sheltering inside the survival tent, add +1.

The survival tent is reinforced and insulated enough to resist damage from inclement weather and other sources. It has 3 integrity to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3782f1b3c8ca8b88]{Withstand Damage} as an incidental vehicle that you can @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair}.

The tent has 4 integrity and is enhanced to automatically construct and deconstruct itself. When you @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.fvxIsI6u73hkrK6J]{Hunker Down} by using it, take +1 momentum on a hit.

The tent is capable of providing prolonged stays in even the most hazardous and isolated environments. It has 5 integrity and a communications kit with advanced antenna technology. When you make a move using the comms, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

system.description: A temporary shelter offering respite from the elements.
